name: erpnext-lead-scraper
description: Monorepo runner for backend, api, frontend, and python scraper/scheduler

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:admin && npm run install:api && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev:split: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c magenta,green "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "cd backend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:single: concurrently -k -n frontend-build,backend -c magenta,green "npm run build:frontend:watch" "npm run dev:backend:single"
scripts.start:single: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:admin && set NODE_ENV=production&& npm run start:backend
